description: Bug Hunt mission support options - Compendium pp.188-189. Roll 2D6 against target number to request support. Each option can only be requested once per mission.
support_points_rule: Support points equal to the mission Priority. Add +2 for 'I'm Too Pretty to Die' difficulty. Spend 1 Reputation for +1 Support.
free_fire_team: You always receive one Fire Team of grunts in addition to your main characters.

support_options.name: Sarge
support_options.contents: 1 figure with Shotgun and Boarding Sword OR Service Pistol and Power Claw
support_options.notes: A battle-hardened veteran who has seen it all and only wants to know how to find more bugs to kill.

support_options.name: Sharp Shooter
support_options.notes: A lone operative with a high-powered sniper rifle.

support_options.name: Recon Patrol
support_options.notes: Recon troopers are outfitted to move quickly and quietly.

support_options.name: Colonial Militia
support_options.notes: Enthusiastic members of the nearest colony defense forces.

support_options.name: Scientific Survey Team
support_options.notes: If a scientist reaches the center of the table and spends one entire round there, count as completing one Objective. Achievable once per mission.

support_options.name: Weapons Support
support_options.contents: Outfit any one figure with choice of LMG, Incinerator, Power Claw, Hyper Blaster, or Plasma Rifle
support_options.notes: Additional armaments have been approved for allocation.

support_options.name: Grenades
support_options.contents: Outfit 4 figures with Frag or Flash grenades OR 1 figure with Mounted Launcher and grenades
support_options.notes: Grenades make bugs explode. More grenades makes more bugs explode.

support_options.name: Intel Report
support_options.contents: +1 bonus to activate Tactical Locations for entire mission
support_options.notes: While the intel nerds don't always get it right, it can't hurt to read their reports.

support_options.name: Soulless Recon Team
support_options.notes: Robotic entities linked into a species-wide network. Somewhat unsettling but dedicated allies.

support_options.name: K'Erin Assault Marine Team
support_options.contents: 4-figure team with Carbines and Boarding Swords
support_options.special_rule: Roll twice and pick the best die when Brawling.
support_options.notes: War-like humanoids eager for an honorable fight. Being knee-deep in alien gore seems to make them oddly content with life.

support_options.name: Precursor Explorer
support_options.contents: 1 figure with Service Pistol and Boarding Sword
support_options.special_rule: You may re-roll one initiative die each round.
support_options.notes: Refined travelers with a mystical outlook on the galaxy. They are often pursuing an abstract higher purpose but tend to be allies of Unity more often than not.
